source_intake_record.raw_question_text: Let $R$ be the rectangle in the Cartesian plane with vertices at $(0,0), (2,0), (2,1),$ and $(0,1)$. $R$ can be divided into two unit squares, as shown; the resulting figure has seven edges. How many subsets of these seven edges form a connected figure?\n<image1>
